name: Macaroni & Lots of Cheese
recipeIngredient: Salt and fresh pepper to taste
1/2 lb Mild Yellow Cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni in plenty of salted water until tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Drain.
2. In a large casserole dish, toss macaroni with butter, Cayenne pepper, and salt and pepper.
3. Mix the milk with the egg and mustard in a separate bowl. Pour this mixture into the macaroni and stir well.
4. Toss the two cheeses together and mix half of the cheese with the macaroni. Set aside the remaining cheese.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 10 minutes.
6. Add half of the remaining cheese and mix well. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Mix in the remaining cheese and bake for another 10 minutes.
8. Makes 4 servings.
